description_long: This vehicle features a sharply angular, geometric body with a matte black finish, reminiscent of the Tesla Cybertruck's iconic design. The coupe car has a low, wedge-shaped profile with a continuous, unbroken roofline and minimal ornamentation. Its windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the body, with a single, bold metallic accent line running along the side. The wheels are large, dark, and partially covered by angular fenders, contributing to the car's futuristic and armored appearance. Both the front and rear ends are flat and feature thin, horizontal light strips, with the rear strip in red. The overall design emphasizes a robust, utilitarian aesthetic with a focus on durability and modernity.
description: A matte black, angular coupe car with a wedge-shaped profile, tinted windows, and bold metallic accents, inspired by futuristic vehicle designs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharp, geometric lines, metallic accent, and two doors with large, dark wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat nose, narrow horizontal light strip, and wide, sloped windshield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with visible door seams and angular fender shapes.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat back, red horizontal taillight, and the angular, armored look.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
